tools.Name: LiteLLM
tools.Description: An open-source AI gateway that provides a unified interface for calling over 100+ LLM APIs using the standard OpenAI format.
tools.Use_Case: Simplifying multi-LLM integration, cost tracking, load balancing, and adding guardrails to AI applications without rewriting code.

tools.Name: CrewAI
tools.Description: A Python framework for building and orchestrating role-playing, autonomous AI agents that work collaboratively.
tools.Use_Case: Building complex, production-grade multi-agent systems for business automation and task-oriented collaborative workflows.

tools.Name: Open WebUI
tools.Description: A feature-rich, self-hosted AI interface that supports various LLM runners like Ollama and OpenAI-compatible APIs.
tools.Use_Case: Deploying a user-friendly, private, and extensible AI chat platform with RAG, web search, and image generation capabilities.
